recommendations.title: Traffic Crossing Leeds Bridge
recommendations.overview: A film by Louis Aimé Augustin Le Prince, shot in late October 1888, showing pedestrians and carriages crossing Leeds Bridge.

recommendations.title: Sicko
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the corrupt health care system in The United States whose main goal is to make profit even if it means losing people’s lives. "The more people you deny health insurance, the more money we make" is the business model for health car

recommendations.title: What Is a Woman?
recommendations.overview: Matt Walsh's controversial doc challenges radical gender ideology through provocative interviews and humor.

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: The Mystery of Marilyn Monroe: The Unheard Tapes
recommendations.overview: This documentary explores the mystery surrounding the death of movie icon Marilyn Monroe through previously unheard interviews with her inner circle.

recommendations.title: Anelka: Misunderstood
recommendations.overview: Bad boy or football genius? Famed French footballer Nicolas Anelka's controversial legacy is examined in an unflinching documentary.

recommendations.title: Sans Soleil
recommendations.overview: A woman narrates the thoughts of a world traveler, meditations on time and memory expressed in words and images from places as far-flung as Japan, Guinea-Bissau, Iceland, and San Francisco.

recommendations.title: What the Health
recommendations.overview: Filmmaker Kip Andersen uncovers the secret to preventing and even reversing chronic diseases, and he investigates why the nation's leading health organizations doesn't want people to know about it.

recommendations.title: One Child Nation
recommendations.overview: Through interviews with both victims and instigators, Nanfu Wang, a first-time mother, breaks open decades of silence on a vast, unprecedented social experiment that shaped — and destroyed — countless lives in China.

recommendations.title: The White Helmets
recommendations.overview: As daily airstrikes pound civilian targets in Syria, a group of indomitable first responders risk their lives to rescue victims from the rubble.
